name: Broccoli, Yams and Mushrooms with Noodles
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Egg noodles or other pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan of boiling water, add noodles and garlic. Cook for 4 minutes.
2. Add yams and continue cooking for 4 minutes.
3. Add broccoli and mushrooms and cook for another 2 minutes or until all vegetables are tender.
4. Drain well.
5. Place in bowl.
6. Toss with cheese, soya sauce, thyme and pepper until cheese melts.
7. Serve immediately. Makes 4 servings.
